bio.lead: I am a Full Stack Developer passionate about building useful software solutions using Python, Django, React, and modern web technologies. I enjoy designing backend solutions, creating clean user experiences, and turning ideas into functional applications.
bullets: Building full-stack applications using Python (Django/Flask) and JavaScript/TypeScript
Developing REST APIs, authentication systems, RBAC, and relational database structures
Projects include school management systems, rental platforms, and digital registration applications
Experience deploying applications using Render, Vercel, PostgreSQL hosting services, and Git-based workflows

projects.title: Ustawi — Smart Rental & Property Platform
projects.description: Full-stack rental platform connecting tenants and property managers. Built with Django, Next.js, and PostgreSQL, featuring authentication, property listings, user workflows, and backend APIs.

projects.title: SchoolSys — School Management & Operations Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack school management application for handling student records, attendance tracking, fee management, and library operations. Implemented role-based dashboards and backend workflows for different user roles including students, teachers, and administrators.

projects.title: ODM Comrades Platform — University Registration Hub
projects.description: Served as ICT Lead for a university registration platform built with PHP and Laravel. Implemented responsive interfaces, registration workflows, and dashboard components used to manage student information and improve digital registration processes.

projects.title: Traviona Consulting — Strategy, Insights & Talent Solutions
projects.description: Built a Django-based consulting platform with content management features, user roles, and business workflows.

projects.title: Digital Leap Africa — Finance Lead (Partner Org.)
projects.description: Responsible for financial oversight and operational support within the organization, contributing to the sustainability and growth of digital initiatives across the region.

experience.duties: Built and deployed full-stack web applications using Django, Flask, Streamlit, and MySQL. Developed authentication systems, backend APIs, database structures, and responsive interfaces for personal and freelance projects.
Trained community members in digital literacy, Git/GitHub, programming fundamentals, and basic web development concepts through practical sessions.

index.title: Tony Wangolo Inganga — Full Stack Developer
index.description: Full Stack Developer focused on backend engineering with Python, Django, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, and modern frontend technologies. Building practical web applications since 2024.

activity.title: Work Activity
activity.description: Real-time work activity: contributions, repositories, languages, and commit history. Open source involvement and coding patterns visualized.
